accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. No diagram/table required per question content; continuity not applicable for single page.

Operator override: VLM rejected only the known watermarked source posture while accepting the visual checks needed for this queue; under this watermarked-shard contract, watermark alone is not a visual blocker when boundary, legibility, diagram/table presence, and continuity checks are intact. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (red text: '老师微信: liuxue119118...') indicating source PDF was watermarked; violates clean-source requirement for official exam materials. Question content is otherwise legible, complete, and self-contained (single page, no diagrams required, question boundary intact).
